series_metadata.series_description: Includes records for the following grant programs which were both state and federally funded: Green Pathways grant program, H-1B Technical Skills training grant, and the Ohio Skills Bank grant program. These records include reports and financial records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records may be scanned and destroyed. Paper records that are not scanned should be retained for three years following the end of the grant period.In the event of an open audit on these records at the end of the retention period, retain until the audit is complete and discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain for three years following the end of the grant period.In the event of an open audit on these records at the end of the retention period, retain until the audit is complete and discrepancies resolved., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
